intro: Saxifragopsis fragarioides, also known as American Saxifragopsis or Strawberry Saxifrage, is a perennial plant native to the northeastern United States and southeastern Canada, belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Bioactive constituents of Saxifragopsis fragarioides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Saxifragopsis fragarioides is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture to support respiratory health and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
